title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla II
overview: The U.N.G.C.C. (United Nations Godzilla Countermeasure Center) recovers the remains of Mecha-King Ghidorah and construct Mechagodzilla as a countermeasure against Godzilla. Meanwhile, a giant egg is discovered along with a new monster called Rodan. The egg is soon found to be none other than an infant Godzillasaurus.

trailers.title: 予告編
trailers.channel_name: Godzilla Channel ゴジラ（東宝特撮）チャンネル
